title: Strawberry Arugula Salad
steps: Preheat oven to 350. Melt coconut oil. Chop the nuts and cover them in coconut oil, cinnamon, cayenne, and maple syrup. dice the red onion and chop the green onion. also chop the strawberries
Now oven is to 350 and nuts are coated - roast them for 8 minutes. Use parchment paper for god sake.
Once nuts are done roasted, put arugula in big bowl and put remaining salad ingredients in bowl. Top with dressing (olive oil, balsamin, stevia, salt, and whatever else sounds good!)
notes: We ended up adding a pomegranate walnut spread which was in our fridge. Toss salad and serve with bread.
